sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n100229" key="sunepigauro/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συνεπι-γαυρόω</orth>, <sense id="n100229.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">encourage, hearten</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τὸ φιλότιμον, τὸ γενναῖον</foreign>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.746d</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">796</biblScope> </bibl> a.</sense> </entryFree>
